title: CustomActionResult
content:
# CustomActionResult


Custom Action Result Builder. Use this helper class to build a Kelvin custom action ack.
Args:
    resource (KRN): The kelvin resource targeted by the action, represented by a KRN (usually
        KRNAssetDataStream)
    action_id (UUID): The ID of the action
    success (bool): Whether the action was successful
    message (Optional[str]): Optional message
    metadata: Dict[str, Any]: Optional metadata for the action ack
    trace_id (Optional[str]): Optional trace ID for the action


## Methods


### to_message() -> CustomActionResultMsg


### from_message(msg: CustomActionResultMsg) -> CustomActionResult
summary: Custom Action Result Builder. Use this helper class to build a Kelvin custom action ack. Args: resource (KRN): The kelvin resource targeted by the action, represented by a KRN (usually KRNAssetDataStream) action_id (UUID): The ID of the action success (bool): Whether the action was successful message (Optional[str]): Optional message metadata: Dict[str, Any]: Optional metadata for the action ack trace_id (Optional[str]): Optional trace ID for the action

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import CustomActionResult

# Usage example
app = CustomActionResult()
